version_description: Also compared to several live versions - current version has bad chord placement/timing.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Simple and easy to play on acoustic guitar. Have fun and play with variations of the chords once you're comfortable.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
Where'd that dirt-faced barefoot rebel kid go?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
He's still crawdad fishin' at the waterin' hole[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
I must have turned eighteen and drove away[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
After all these years, I'm finding my way[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, back to climbin' up that old oak tree[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Back to the mud underneath my feet[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
Back to a simpler state of mind, an easier life, an easier time[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Bottle rocket, black cat, firefly[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
A plywood ramp stacked three bricks high[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Back to real, back to me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
Back to free[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
Like we used to be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
You and me[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Let's get back to free[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C[/ch]

Free[/tab]
